title.en: However, it is too difficult to improve the ori...

content.en:
It is not easy for the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm to improve his cultivation, he can improve the rules of the Origin on the other side, and every time he improves the realm, the Origin of the Other Shore will skyrocket.

However, it is too difficult to improve the original rules of the other side!

Like Ye Tian, the other side of the origin rule has reached the ninety-four-level realm, but it is very difficult to improve to the ninety-five-level realm.

This is still that he has the Origin Endowment of the other side, and it is many times easier to comprehend the Origin Rules of the Other Origin Upper Realm than other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, if he allows other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to improve the Origin Rules of the other side, I am afraid that he will not make the slightest progress in comprehending the 100 million primeval eras.

Many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors have spent a long time gradually ascending to the Origin of the other side.

It's like 100 million primeval epochs can increase 100,000 other shore origins, and 10 billion primeval epochs, wouldn't it be possible to increase 10 million other shore origins, and sooner or later they can be promoted to the middle and even late origin realm!

Of course, if you hit a bottleneck, that's another story.

The resources that were useful to Ye Tian in the past are no longer useful.

"Without resources, the progress of the other side of the origin is too slow, almost stagnant!"

Ye Tian cultivated for a while and said with emotion.

He didn't want to rely on a large number of years to slowly improve the origin of the other side, and he had to find an opportunity, or a treasure that would help improve the origin rules of the other side, so that the realm of the origin rules of the other side could break through.

In this way, his strength will skyrocket.

this day.

Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Ice and Rain to discuss resource issues.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "Lord of Endless, we also have a few treasures on Wind Tooth Island that will breed resources that will help us improve our cultivation, but we will have to wait for a long time. Now, the resources and treasures of the land on the other side of eternity are occupied, and if you want resources, you have to grab them, which is something that cannot be helped. "

Ye Tian nodded, also agreeing with this statement.

He chatted with the Lord of Ice and Rain for a long time, and then went to chat with the Lord of Wind Fang, coupled with the inheritance of Wind Tooth Island, he knew the origin of many treasure land resources.

After some research, I finally know which places have a lot of resources, but they are difficult to obtain.

His first goal is still the Unsullied Abyss, and there are some resources here that can help him.

It's just that he didn't know which resources were helpful to the Origin Ascending Realm before, and he just passed by many places casually and didn't really investigate carefully.

But now, he knew.

......

The Unsullied Abyss.

Ye Tian came to the Innocent Australopithecus Clan, the Innocent Australopithecus Clan belonged to an incomparably powerful clan among the creatures of the Innocent Abyss, and this clan possessed a Sullen Australopithecus of the Overlord level.

With Ye Tian's current strength, when he encounters the Innocent Ancient Ape Overlord, he will also be easily killed by the other party.

However, he did not provoke the Innocent Australopithecus Clan, but wanted to blend in with the Innocent Australopithecus Clan and obtain a resource in the territory of the Innocent Australopithecus Clan, the Innocent Source Wood.

The Innocent Source Wood is a special tree core cut from the Innocent Source Tree, also known as the Innocent Source Wood, from which a Pure Source Wood Liquid can be extracted, which helps the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm to ascend to the other side of the Origin.

The Innocent Source Tree is also valuable to the Innocent Australopithecus family, and it is certainly not easy to take the Innocent Source Tree.

"Let's get in first!"

Ye Tianxian approached the Innocent Ancient Ape Clan, and sensing that the Innocent Ancient Ape was approaching, he directly attacked and killed a large number of Innocent Ancient Ape in an instant, and even their bodies were also shattered.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably terrifying Innocent Ancient Ape descended, and took out a top-notch Origin Rule Weapon Long Stick in his hand.

This Origin Rule weapon should not have been refined by it, but a weapon of an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but it was obtained by it, and it became its weapon.

I saw that this Innocent Ancient Ape Overlord directly smashed it with a long stick, and the terrifying power was far beyond his imagination.

Ye Tian resisted with all his might, but his body was still shattered by a stick.

"I can't stop it, the strength of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord is still far beyond my imagination!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to copy one of the Origin Middle Realm Innocent Ape he saw, and with a slight change in his aura, he blended into the Innocent Elder Ape clan.

In this way, the Innocent Abyss clan could not recognize Ye Tianlai, they only thought that Ye Tian was an Innocent Ancient Ape who had escaped from the previous battle, plus the creatures of the Innocent Abyss did not have too high intelligence, so it was not easy to reveal their identities.

......

The interior of the Australopithecus family.

One by one, the Innocent Ancient Ape cultivated on the Innocent Source Tree.

When he saw this, he was pondering how to take the Innocent Source Wood.

"Drive away the weaker Innocent Ape first, I'll occupy a Pure Source Tree, and then secretly take the Pure Source Tree!"

Ye Tian thought of this method.

Subsequently.

He came to an Innocent Source Tree and drove away the Innocent Ancient Ape cultivating on it.

After that, he pretended to cultivate, and actually began to dig out the Innocent Source Wood inside.

Soon, he was able to dig and was not stopped.

"Looks like this is going to work!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Soon, he left here with this piece of Innocent Source Wood and sent it to his true body replica body.

After that, he returned.

In the years that followed, he used this method to obtain one unsullied source wood after another.

In the beginning.

The amount of Innocent Source Wood he obtained was not too much, and it could not affect the Innocent Australopithecus clan.

However, he moved more and more Innocent Source Trees, which caused a lot of Innocent Australopithecus to be overturned, and they were furious when they found that many of the Innocent Source Trees had been scrapped.

this day.

Ye Tian attracted the attention of the Innocent Ancient Ape Overlord, and the other party directly beat Ye Tian's Innocent Ancient Ape copy body to serious injuries, threatening him not to allow him to do so.

Ye Tian knew that this copy body was useless, and he couldn't easily take away the Innocent Source Wood.

"That's okay, this time I have obtained a total of more than one hundred and sixty Innocent Source Trees, if the Lord of Ice and Rain knows, he will definitely be excited!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He returned to Wind Tooth Island with so many Innocent Source Wood, and then slowly refined the Pure Source Wood Liquid in his own palace.

Soon, some of the sap of the Innocent Source was extracted.

He began to use these Innocent Source Wood Liquids to cultivate and improve his other origin.

......
